title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS layered on Claude Code that persists project context, architecture decisions, and coding standards across sessions. It adds persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, a Pulse dashboard, and a seven-phase algorithm for AI-assisted development.
writeup: The video introduces PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on top of Claude Code that retains project context, architecture decisions, and coding standards across sessions. It addresses a core limitation of session-based AI coding: losing accumulated context between conversations. Key components include persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, a Pulse dashboard, and a seven-phase algorithm for AI-assisted development.
